name: X-Golf Reno
address: Shayden Summit, 13925 S Virginia St Ste. 234, Reno, NV 89511
about: X-Golf Reno is an indoor golf simulator venue that combines advanced technology with a sports bar atmosphere. The facility features 8 state-of-the-art golf simulators, utilizing camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors for accurate and realistic gameplay. Each simulator bay can accommodate up to 6 people and is priced per hour, making it suitable for both individual players and groups. The venue offers a full bar and food service, along with various amenities like TVs, private event hosting, and PGA-certified lessons. It caters to a diverse clientele including beginners, serious golfers, and those looking for entertainment, with a strong emphasis on booking tee times in advance.
why_golfers_like_it: World's most accurate golf simulator technology
Flexible pricing per hour for groups of up to 6 people
Full bar and food menu available on-site
Private rooms available for events and parties

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas. Food menu available online.
Full bar with beer on tap or by the glass, cocktails, and wines.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs, but rental clubs are available. Adult rentals are $10/session per set, while kid rentals are free.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed, as the venue offers a full bar and kitchen service with its own menu of food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes 1 hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. For groups, each additional player typically adds an hour to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome, and the venue offers club rentals for kids at no extra charge.
